_comment: Bundle SKUs, sold on two channels. STEAM: a cheaper, one-time Complete-the-Set DLC package licensed to the buyer's Steam account — a frozen snapshot of the collection at purchase time, no future additions. DEMOD MARKETPLACE: priced higher because it is a LIVING bundle — new patches are added over its lifetime and it installs/updates on the buyer's DeMoD account + device. 'value' is the full a-la-carte retail of the contents; per-channel 'savings' = value - that channel's price. 'match' is a glob over paid patch ids; 'includes' is an explicit id list; 'exclude_bundles' subtracts other bundles' ids (the 'everything else' complement). 'channels.steam.dlc_appid' = the Steam DLC App ID for that pack. Deluxe is the Steam Complete-the-Set PACKAGE of the three child DLCs (metal-forge + voices + effects = all 81 paid); Steam auto-discounts it by whatever children you already own, so the child Steam prices sum just above Deluxe. 'marketplace_transfer:false' = a Steam purchase does NOT grant the DeMoD-marketplace entitlement (separate channels, separate licenses). See PRICING.md.

marketplace.pitch: The whole collection, on your DeMoD account — with lifetime updates: every new patch we add joins your library. Installs straight to the device.

steam.pitch: The entire collection — $420 of patches for $120. A one-time Steam Complete-the-Set: it's the three packs together, and Steam discounts it by whatever you already own.

marketplace.pitch: 30 metal/distortion/dynamics effects ($200 value), with lifetime updates on your DeMoD account.

steam.pitch: 30 metal/distortion/dynamics effects ($200 value) for $60 — a one-time Steam snapshot.

marketplace.pitch: 18 acoustic/orchestral instrument voices ($110 value), with lifetime updates on your DeMoD account.

steam.pitch: 18 instrument voices ($110 value) for $35 — a one-time Steam snapshot.

marketplace.pitch: 33 effects, dynamics + utilities ($110 value), with lifetime updates on your DeMoD account.

steam.pitch: 33 effects + utilities ($110 value) for $35 — a one-time Steam snapshot.
